app.name: JID
app.description: Connecting talent with opportunities — jobs, mentorship, and career growth

home.title: Welcome to JID
home.subtitle: Your platform for employment and career mentorship

errors.notFoundDescription: The page you are looking for could not be found.
errors.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.genericDescription: The application encountered a problem. You can retry or come back later.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to access this page

signup.title: Create individual account
signup.subtitle: Join JID and start your career journey
signup.passwordHint: At least 8 characters with upper, lower, number, and special character
signup.acceptTermsLabel: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy

errors.generic: Could not create account. Please try again.
Invalid credentials. Check your email and password and try again.
errors.suspended: Invalid credentials. Check your email and password and try again.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link
forgotPassword.sentMessage: If the email is registered, you will receive a reset link shortly.

errors.generic: Could not send reset link. Try again.

suspended.title: Account suspended
suspended.message: Your account has been temporarily suspended. Contact support if you believe this is an error.

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
mfa.subtitle: Enter the code from your authenticator app

setup.title: Set up two-factor authentication
setup.subtitle: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app
setup.instructions: Use Google Authenticator or a similar app to scan the code below.
setup.confirmPrompt: Enter the code from your app to confirm

errors.enrollFailed: Could not set up two-factor authentication

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.subtitle: One last step before signing in
verifyEmail.instructions: We sent a confirmation link to your email. Open it to complete registration.

verifyPhone.title: Verify phone number
verifyPhone.subtitle: Enter your Saudi mobile number to receive a code

errors.rateLimit: Rate limit exceeded. Try again later.

strength.requirements: Must include upper, lower, number, and special character

validation.fullNameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters

entityType.title: Entity account type
entityType.subtitle: Choose the type of organization you represent

company.title: Company
company.description: Register your company and submit an ownership claim

subtitle.company: Create an account and submit a company ownership claim
subtitle.university: Create an account and submit a university ownership claim

account.passwordHint: At least 8 characters with upper, lower, number, and special character
account.acceptTermsLabel: I agree to the terms of use and privacy policy
account.error: Could not create account. Please try again.

entity.newDomainsHint: Separate domains with commas, e.g. example.com, mail.example.sa

claim.domainHint: Your business email must use one of the entity's approved domains

verifyEmail.instructions: We sent a confirmation link to your email. Open it to complete signup.
verifyEmail.spamHint: Check your spam folder if you don't see the email

pendingReview.title: Your request is under review
pendingReview.subtitle: The JID team is reviewing your entity ownership claim
pendingReview.overdueMessage: Review is taking longer than usual
pendingReview.overdueAlert: Your request is taking longer than our standard SLA. Our team will review it as soon as possible.
pendingReview.staffNote: No need to resubmit — we'll notify you when the review is complete.

rejected.title: Ownership claim rejected
rejected.blockedMessage: Reapplication is blocked until the waiting period ends.

reapply.title: Reapply for ownership
reapply.blocked: The reapplication window has not opened yet.

validation.fullNameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.companyNameMin: Entity name must be at least 2 characters
validation.companyNameArMin: Arabic name must be at least 2 characters
validation.claimantNameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.claimantTitleMin: Job title must be at least 2 characters

dashboard.title: Staff dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome to the JID operations portal

claimsCard.title: Claims queue
claimsCard.description: Review company and university ownership claims

claimReview.title: Review claim — {company}
claimReview.reviewNotesPlaceholder: Enter internal notes (required for approve and reject)
claimReview.rejectionReasonPlaceholder: Reason sent to the claimant when rejecting
claimReview.checklistIncomplete: Complete all checklist items before approving

staffCard.title: Operations team
staffCard.description: View staff and invite new members

inviteStaff.title: Invite staff member
inviteStaff.subtitle: Send a secure email invitation

acceptInvite.title: Accept staff invitation
acceptInvite.subtitle: Create your account for {email}
acceptInvite.invalidToken: Link is invalid, expired, or already used
acceptInvite.passwordHint: At least 8 characters with upper, lower, number, and special character
acceptInvite.mfaSubtitle: Required before accessing the staff portal

validation.reasonMin: Reason must be at least 3 characters
validation.fullNameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters

public.privateGateMessage: Sign in with an approved company or mentor account to view discoverable profiles, or ask the owner to make their profile public.
public.emptyStateMessage: Complete the steps below to introduce yourself to companies and mentors on JID.
public.wizardSubtitle: Each step unlocks more visibility to employers.
public.completionBannerHint: Complete the remaining steps to maximize your visibility.
public.suspendedAdminMessage: This profile is suspended and hidden from all non-staff viewers.
public.staffPreviewHint: Staff preview — profile content below is not public.

public.commitmentScoreHint: This company's own hiring commitment on JID — not a comparison to other employers.
public.unclaimedMessage: Claim this profile to manage jobs, respond to candidates, and build your employer brand on JID.
public.activeJobsPostedHint: {count} roles posted in the last 12 months
public.activeJobsTodo: Full job listings will appear here when the Job Board module is connected.
public.partnerMentorsTodo: Partner mentor roster will appear here when the Mentorship module is connected.

public.staffPendingMessage: This mentor profile has status "{status}" and is hidden from public visitors.

edit.universityHint: University and college are updated during onboarding for now.
edit.avatarUploadFailed: Upload failed — paste a URL instead
edit.headline: Headline

privacy.title: Profile privacy
privacy.subtitle: Control who can discover your profile on JID.
privacy.visibilityPrivateHint: Only you and JID staff can open your profile. Companies and mentors cannot find you.
privacy.visibilityDiscoverableHint: Verified companies and approved mentors can view your profile when additional toggles below are enabled.
privacy.showToCompaniesHint: الشركات الموثّقة فقط ترى ملفك عند تفعيل هذا الخيار.
privacy.showInUniversityStatsHint: جامعتك ترى إحصائيات مجمّعة فقط — دون بيانات تعريف شخصية.

emails.title: Manage email addresses
emails.subtitle: Add additional emails for applications and notifications.

jobPrivacy.title: Job privacy
jobPrivacy.subtitle: Control what recruiters see when you apply to opportunities.
jobPrivacy.showToRecruitersHint: Allows verified companies to open your profile when reviewing your application.
jobPrivacy.allowDirectContactHint: Companies may contact you directly through the platform.
jobPrivacy.showApplicationHistoryHint: Your past application status is visible when applying again.

becomeMentor.pageSubtitle: Share your experience and guide job seekers on JID.
becomeMentor.submitSuccess: Your mentor application was submitted for review.

step1.title: Professional information
step1.subtitle: Tell us about your current role and experience.
step1.headline: Professional headline
step1.headlinePlaceholder: e.g. Product leader helping early-career talent

step2.title: Expertise areas
step2.subtitle: Add up to 5 areas where you can mentor others.
step2.areasHint: Press Enter to add each tag (max 5).

step3.title: Mentor bio
step3.subtitle: Write a short bio and choose languages and preferred mediums.
step3.bioPlaceholder: Describe how you mentor and what mentees can expect…
step3.languagesHint: Select all languages you can mentor in.
step3.mediumsHint: How do you prefer to meet mentees?

step4.title: Verification
step4.subtitle: We verify mentors via LinkedIn — no document uploads required.
step4.noUploadsNote: File uploads are not required at this stage. Staff may request additional verification later.

step5.title: Review your application
step5.subtitle: This is how your mentor card will appear after approval.

pending.title: Application under review
pending.body: Your mentor application has been submitted. Staff will review it and you will be notified when a decision is made.
